mechanism: Covenant-lite structures enable amend-and-extend transactions that push maturities forward, partially absorbing the wall. However, this delays rather than eliminates defaults, potentially concentrating stress into a narrower window. Amend-and-extend surges precede defaults by 12-18 months.
regime_dependence: Amend-and-extend available in low-stress environments; may become unavailable precisely when the maturity wall creates most stress, producing cliff dynamics.
